settings.summary: Configure `scrollbar2` as a compact bar widget or a reserve-space floating panel. Theme-aware colors use Noctalia color pickers and also allow custom hex values.

colorPicker.label: Select color
colorPicker.desc: Choose a theme color or pick a custom color.

mode.label: Placement
mode.desc: Choose whether the bar lives in the Noctalia bar or as a reserve-space floating panel.

scale.label: Floating Panel Scale
scale.desc: Scale the floating panel renderer without changing the saved base dimensions.

margin.label: Floating Panel Margin
margin.desc: Padding between the floating panel background and the bar itself.

offsetH.label: Horizontal Offset
offsetH.desc: Move the floating panel left or right from its centered position.

offsetV.label: Vertical Offset
offsetV.desc: Move the floating panel away from or toward the screen edge.

radiusScale.label: Background Radius Scale
radiusScale.desc: Scale the floating panel background corner radius.

backgroundColor.label: Background Color
backgroundColor.desc: Theme key or hex color for the floating panel background, or `none`.

backgroundOpacity.label: Background Opacity
backgroundOpacity.desc: Opacity of the floating panel background.

gradientEnabled.label: Enable Background Gradient
gradientEnabled.desc: Overlay a transparent-to-color gradient over the floating panel background.

gradientColor.label: Gradient Color
gradientColor.desc: Theme key or hex color for the floating panel gradient.

gradientOpacity.label: Gradient Opacity
gradientOpacity.desc: Opacity of the floating panel gradient.

gradientDirection.label: Gradient Direction
gradientDirection.desc: Choose whether the gradient runs vertically or horizontally.

sameOutput.label: Only Same Output
sameOutput.desc: Show only windows from the current screen.

position.label: Track Position
position.desc: For Floating Panel mode, pin the track to the top or bottom edge.

width.label: Track Width
width.desc: Width of the track as a percentage of the screen width.

height.label: Track Height
height.desc: Fixed height for the track. Set to 0 for automatic height.

thickness.label: Track Thickness
thickness.desc: Minimum visual thickness of the track.

borderRadius.label: Track Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the outer track.

opacity.label: Track Opacity
opacity.desc: Overall opacity of the track background.

color.label: Track Color
color.desc: Theme key or hex color for the track background.

borderColor.label: Border Color
borderColor.desc: Theme key or hex color for enabled borders.

borderWidth.label: Border Width
borderWidth.desc: Thickness of enabled track and segment borders.

shadowEnabled.label: Enable Track Shadow
shadowEnabled.desc: Render a drop shadow under the track.

segment.label: Segment Borders
segment.desc: Draw a border around each individual segment.

display.label: Display & Floating Panel
display.desc: Placement mode and reserve-space floating panel settings.

track.label: Track Geometry
track.desc: Width, spacing, sizing, and shadow controls for the main track.

window.label: Window Labels
window.desc: Toggle labels, choose alignment, and configure typography and scaling.

trackColors.label: Track Colors & Borders
trackColors.desc: Theme-aware colors and border toggles for the track.

focusColors.label: Focus Colors
focusColors.desc: Focused, hover, and default colors used by the focus system.

windowColors.label: Window Colors
windowColors.desc: Icon and title colors for focused, hover, and default states.

filtering.label: Filtering
filtering.desc: Control which windows appear in the bar.

animation.label: Animation
animation.desc: Focus movement, fade, and transition timing.

thickness.label: Focus Thickness
thickness.desc: Height of the moving focus indicator or the fade-state fill.

borderRadius.label: Focus Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the focus indicator.

verticalAlign.label: Focus Alignment
verticalAlign.desc: Where the focus strip sits inside the track.

shadowEnabled.label: Enable Focus Glow
shadowEnabled.desc: Add a glow around the focus indicator.

focused.label: Focused Color
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for the active segment.

hover.label: Hover Color
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for hovered segments.

default.label: Default Color
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for resting segments.

showIcon.label: Show Icons
showIcon.desc: Render application icons inside each segment.

showTitle.label: Show Titles
showTitle.desc: Render window titles inside each segment.

focusedOnly.label: Focused Only
focusedOnly.desc: Only show label content for the focused segment.

font.label: Font Family
font.desc: Font family used for window titles.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.desc: Base size of the window title text.

iconScale.label: Icon Scale
iconScale.desc: Scale multiplier applied to application icons.

titleScale.label: Title Scale
titleScale.desc: Scale multiplier applied to title text.

focused.label: Focused Icon Color
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for focused icons.

hover.label: Hover Icon Color
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for hovered icons.

default.label: Default Icon Color
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for idle icons.

focused.label: Focused Title Color
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for focused titles.

hover.label: Hover Title Color
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for hovered titles.

default.label: Default Title Color
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for idle titles.

enabled.label: Enable Animation
enabled.desc: Animate focus movement, fades, and color changes.

type.label: Animation Type
type.desc: Choose how the focus state transitions between windows.
